problem.title: CT-LIO GT-backed public benchmark readiness on HDL-400 ROS2 data
problem.question: What still blocks a GT-backed CT-LIO public benchmark contract after the reference-based HDL-400 comparison is available?
problem.blocker: A reference-based CT-LIO comparison now exists separately, but this repository still does not ship an independently curated GT CSV aligned to the extracted HDL-400 LiDAR+IMU sequence.
problem.scope_decision: Scoped out of main empirical study. CT-LIO remains reference-based only on HDL-400. KITTI Odometry lacks IMU data for LIO methods, and HDL-400 has no independently curated GT. This problem stays blocked and is documented as appendix/artifact material only.
problem.next_step: No action planned. CT-LIO GT-backed is excluded from the main study scope. If an independent GT source becomes available for HDL-400, this can be revisited.

dataset.gt_csv: MISSING: repository-usable open GT CSV for HDL-400 is not prepared yet
MISSING: repository-usable open GT CSV for HDL-400 is not prepared yet

planned_variants.label: IMU preintegration default
planned_variants.intent: Baseline CT-LIO profile with IMU bias estimation and a short fixed-lag prior.

planned_variants.label: Seed-only fast
planned_variants.intent: Keep the IMU seed but avoid the heavier lag smoother path.

planned_variants.label: History smoother dense
planned_variants.intent: Use a slightly longer lag window and one extra relinearization pass once a GT-backed public benchmark contract is ready.
